import * as THREE from 'three'; import { WebGPURenderer, Scene, PerspectiveCamera, PlaneGeometry, Mesh, MeshBasicNodeMaterial, Points, PointsNodeMaterial, BufferGeometry, Float32BufferAttribute, SRGBColorSpace, ACESFilmicToneMapping, PostProcessing, } from 'three/webgpu'; import { bloom } from 'three/addons/tsl/display/BloomNode.js'; import { film } from 'three/addons/tsl/display/FilmNode.js'; import { pass, Fn, float, vec2, vec3, vec4, positionLocal, positionWorld, uv, time, abs, clamp, floor, mod, mix, smoothstep, step, fract, sin, Loop, } from 'three/tsl'; if (!window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) { const canvas = document.getElementById('hero-canvas'); const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768; try { // WebGPURenderer falls back to WebGL; alpha:true lets the CSS sun show through const renderer = new WebGPURenderer({ canvas, alpha: true, antialias: !isMobile }); renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, isMobile ? 1 : 1.5)); await renderer.init(); renderer.setSize(canvas.offsetWidth, canvas.offsetHeight); renderer.outputColorSpace = SRGBColorSpace; renderer.toneMapping = ACESFilmicToneMapping; renderer.toneMappingExposure = 1.25; const scene = new Scene(); scene.fog = new THREE.FogExp2(0x020010, 0.009); const camera = new PerspectiveCamera(62, canvas.offsetWidth / canvas.offsetHeight, 0.1, 300); camera.position.set(0, 2.8, 12); camera.lookAt(0, 0.6, -80); scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0x080030, 0.9)); const pinkGlow = new THREE.PointLight(0xff0080, 2.2, 130); pinkGlow.position.set(0, 4, -55); scene.add(pinkGlow); const blueGlow = new THREE.PointLight(0x0055ff, 1.4, 100); blueGlow.position.set(0, 2, 5); scene.add(blueGlow); // ── SUN DISC — TSL gradient + scan lines, rendered inside scene so post-processing // never covers it. fogNode=null keeps it vivid at any depth. Bloom makes it glow. const sunMat = new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: false }); sunMat.fogNode = null; // not affected by scene fog sunMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const vy = uv.y; // Gradient: white top → ice-blue → electric blue → violet → neon pink bottom const white = vec3(float(1.00), float(1.00), float(1.00)); const iceBlu = vec3(float(0.65), float(0.82), float(1.00)); const elecBlu = vec3(float(0.10), float(0.38), float(1.00)); const violet = vec3(float(0.50), float(0.00), float(0.88)); const pink = vec3(float(1.00), float(0.00), float(0.62)); const grad1 = mix(pink, violet, smoothstep(float(0.00), float(0.28), vy)); const grad2 = mix(grad1, elecBlu, smoothstep(float(0.28), float(0.55), vy)); const grad3 = mix(iceBlu, white, smoothstep(float(0.78), float(1.00), vy)); const col = mix(grad2, grad3, smoothstep(float(0.55), float(0.78), vy)); // Iconic Outrun scan-line bands in the lower half (higher density toward bottom) const scanY = fract(vy.mul(float(22))); const scanOn = step(float(0.34), scanY); const inLower = float(1).sub(step(float(0.5), vy)); // 1 when vy < 0.5 const alpha = float(1).sub(inLower.mul(float(1).sub(scanOn))); return vec4(col, alpha); })(); const sunGeo = new THREE.CircleGeometry(40, 80); const sunDisc = new Mesh(sunGeo, sunMat); sunDisc.position.set(0, 25, -165); // high in sky, behind terrain scene.add(sunDisc); // TSL depth helper const depthT = (wz) => clamp(wz.negate().sub(float(12)).div(float(82)), float(0), float(1)); // ── ROAD GRID — world-space procedural TSL ──────────────────────────────── const ROAD_HW = 16; const gridMat = new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: false }); gridMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const wx = positionWorld.x; const wz = positionWorld.z; const gx = fract(wx.div(float(2.5))); const gz = fract(wz.div(float(2.5)).add(time.mul(float(3.4)))); const lw = float(0.044); const ex = float(0.5).sub(abs(gx.sub(float(0.5)))); const ez = float(0.5).sub(abs(gz.sub(float(0.5)))); const isX = clamp(float(1).sub(ex.div(lw)), float(0), float(1)); const isZ = clamp(float(1).sub(ez.div(lw)), float(0), float(1)); const isLine = clamp(isX.add(isZ), float(0), float(1)); const d = depthT(wz); const brt = mix(float(4.8), float(0.0), d); const edgeT = clamp(abs(wx).div(float(ROAD_HW)), float(0), float(1)); const fade = float(1).sub(smoothstep(float(0.7), float(1.0), edgeT)); const row = floor(wz.div(float(2.5)).add(time.mul(float(3.4)))); const isBlue = float(1).sub(step(float(1), mod(row, float(2)))); const arcBlue = vec3(float(0.0), float(0.44), float(1.0)); const arcViol = vec3(float(0.55), float(0.0), float(1.0)); const arcPurp = vec3(float(0.35), float(0.0), float(0.80)); const horzCol = mix(arcViol, arcBlue, isBlue); const lineCol = mix(arcPurp, horzCol, clamp(isZ, float(0), float(1))); return vec4(lineCol.mul(brt).mul(fade), isLine.mul(fade)); })(); const gGeo = new PlaneGeometry(ROAD_HW * 2, 200, 1, 1); gGeo.rotateX(-Math.PI / 2); const ground = new Mesh(gGeo, gridMat); ground.position.set(0, 0, -88); scene.add(ground); // ── ROAD RAILS — neon pink, TSL pulse ──────────────────────────────────── const railMat = new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: false }); railMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const d = depthT(positionWorld.z); const pulse = sin(time.mul(float(2.0))).mul(float(0.25)).add(float(0.85)); const b = mix(float(7.5), float(0.0), d).mul(pulse); return vec4(float(1), float(0.0), float(0.5), b); })(); for (const sx of [-1, 1]) { const g = new PlaneGeometry(0.24, 200); g.rotateX(-Math.PI / 2); const m = new Mesh(g, railMat); m.position.set(sx * ROAD_HW, 0.01, -88); scene.add(m); } // ── CENTER DASHES — magenta, TSL ───────────────────────────────────────── const dashMat = new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: false }); dashMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const wz = positionWorld.z; const d = depthT(wz); const b = mix(float(5.5), float(0.0), d); const ph = fract(wz.div(float(4.0)).add(time.mul(float(5.44)))); const on = step(ph, float(0.52)); return vec4(float(1), float(0.0), float(1.0), b.mul(on)); })(); const dGeo = new PlaneGeometry(0.18, 200); dGeo.rotateX(-Math.PI / 2); const dsh = new Mesh(dGeo, dashMat); dsh.position.set(0, 0.02, -88); scene.add(dsh); // ── TERRAIN — TSL FBM noise + vertex displacement ───────────────────────── const hashFn = Fn(([p]) => fract(sin(p.dot(vec2(127.1, 311.7))).mul(float(43758.5453))) ); const noiseFn = Fn(([p]) => { const i = floor(p); const f = fract(p); const u = f.mul(f).mul(float(3).sub(f.mul(float(2)))); return mix( mix(hashFn([i]), hashFn([i.add(vec2(1, 0))]), u.x), mix(hashFn([i.add(vec2(0, 1))]), hashFn([i.add(vec2(1, 1))]), u.x), u.y, ); }); const fbmFn = Fn(([p]) => { const pv = p.toVar(); const v = float(0).toVar(); const amp = float(0.5).toVar(); Loop(5, () => { v.addAssign(noiseFn([pv]).mul(amp)); pv.mulAssign(float(2.1)); amp.mulAssign(float(0.5)); }); return v; }); const terrainMat = new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: true, side: THREE.DoubleSide }); const terrainH = float(28); terrainMat.positionNode = positionLocal.add( vec3(float(0), fbmFn([positionLocal.xz.mul(float(0.038))]).mul(terrainH), float(0)) ); terrainMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const h = fbmFn([positionWorld.xz.mul(float(0.038))]); const indigo = vec3(float(0.03), float(0.0), float(0.20)); const violet = vec3(float(0.55), float(0.0), float(0.90)); const pink = vec3(float(0.90), float(0.0), float(0.55)); const col = mix( mix(indigo, violet, clamp(h.mul(float(1.5)), float(0), float(1))), pink, clamp(h.mul(h).mul(float(0.9)), float(0), float(1)) ); const d = clamp(positionWorld.z.negate().sub(float(10)).div(float(110)), float(0), float(1)); const eFade = clamp(abs(positionWorld.x).sub(float(18)).div(float(14)), float(0), float(1)); return vec4(col.mul(float(1.1)), eFade.mul(d.oneMinus()).mul(float(0.9))); })(); const TW = 110, TD = 260; for (const sx of [-1, 1]) { const tg = new PlaneGeometry(TW, TD, 55, 80); tg.rotateX(-Math.PI / 2); const tm = new Mesh(tg, terrainMat); tm.position.set(sx * (ROAD_HW + TW / 2), 0, -88); scene.add(tm); } // ── STARS — PointsNodeMaterial, TSL twinkle ─────────────────────────────── const SN = isMobile ? 200 : 500; const sArr = new Float32Array(SN * 3); for (let i = 0; i < SN; i++) { sArr[i*3] = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 520; sArr[i*3+1] = 5 + Math.random() * 110; sArr[i*3+2] = -20 - Math.random() * 240; } const starGeo = new BufferGeometry(); starGeo.setAttribute('position', new Float32BufferAttribute(sArr, 3)); const starMat = new PointsNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: false, sizeAttenuation: true }); starMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const phase = positionWorld.x.mul(float(0.022)).add(positionWorld.z.mul(float(0.008))); const twk = sin(time.mul(float(2.1)).add(phase)).mul(float(0.35)).add(float(0.72)); const t = abs(sin(positionWorld.x.mul(float(0.031)))); const col = mix(vec3(float(0.55), float(0.75), float(1.0)), vec3(float(1), float(0.9), float(1.0)), t); return vec4(col, twk); })(); starMat.sizeNode = float(0.42).add( sin(time.mul(float(1.9)).add(positionWorld.z.mul(float(0.013)))).mul(float(0.18)) ); scene.add(new Points(starGeo, starMat)); // ── SPARKLE PARTICLES — neon pink / electric blue, two layers ──────────── const pLayers = [ { count: isMobile ? 110 : 260, yMin: 0.2, yRange: 12, zRange: 85, xRange: 34, sz: 1.2, spd: 2.8 }, { count: isMobile ? 55 : 130, yMin: 0.0, yRange: 2, zRange: 60, xRange: 18, sz: 0.7, spd: 4.1 }, ]; for (const { count, yMin, yRange, zRange, xRange, sz, spd } of pLayers) { const pArr = new Float32Array(count * 3); for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { pArr[i*3] = (Math.random() - 0.5) * xRange * 2; pArr[i*3+1] = yMin + Math.random() * yRange; pArr[i*3+2] = -4 - Math.random() * zRange; } const pGeo = new BufferGeometry(); pGeo.setAttribute('position', new Float32BufferAttribute(pArr, 3)); const pMat = new PointsNodeMaterial({ transparent: true, depthWrite: false, sizeAttenuation: true }); const spdF = float(spd); pMat.colorNode = Fn(() => { const t = sin(positionWorld.x.mul(float(0.25)).add(time.mul(float(0.5)))).mul(float(0.5)).add(float(0.5)); const pink = vec3(float(1.0), float(0.0), float(0.55)); const blue = vec3(float(0.0), float(0.44), float(1.0)); const col = mix(pink, blue, t); const flk = sin(time.mul(spdF).add(positionWorld.z.mul(float(0.11)))).mul(float(0.45)).add(float(0.62)); const dfd = clamp(positionWorld.z.negate().div(float(60)), float(0), float(1)); return vec4(col.mul(float(1.8)), flk.mul(dfd.oneMinus().mul(float(0.88)).add(float(0.12)))); })(); pMat.sizeNode = float(sz).add( sin(time.mul(spdF).add(positionWorld.x.mul(float(0.18)))).mul(float(0.65)) ); scene.add(new Points(pGeo, pMat)); } // ── POST-PROCESSING: bloom (neon glow) + film (analog grain) ───────────── const postFX = new PostProcessing(renderer); const scenePass = pass(scene, camera); const sceneTex = scenePass.getTextureNode(); const bloomFX = bloom(sceneTex, 2.4, 0.62, 0.03); const combined = sceneTex.add(bloomFX); const filmFX = film(combined, 0.07, 0); postFX.outputNode = filmFX; // ── RENDER LOOP ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── let mouseX = 0; async function tick() { if (!document.hidden) { if (!isMobile) { camera.position.x += (mouseX * 2.5 - camera.position.x) * 0.022; camera.lookAt(0, 0.6, -80); } await postFX.renderAsync(); } requestAnimationFrame(tick); } tick(); window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouseX = (e.clientX / window.innerWidth - 0.5) * 2; }, { passive: true }); window.addEventListener('resize', () => { renderer.setSize(canvas.offsetWidth, canvas.offsetHeight); camera.aspect = canvas.offsetWidth / canvas.offsetHeight; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); }); } catch (e) { console.warn('[Nova64 hero] TSL init failed:', e); document.body.classList.add('no-webgl'); } }
